headline: ₹0-100 Cr at risk over medium term if ESG lag persists — JSW Steel's ₹100 billion carbon reduction investment signals sectoral ESG pressure for JSW Energy
what_matters: Risk of P/E compression (5-10%) if ESG narrative weakens; no immediate margin erosion.
BRSR [MANDATORY], CDP, GRI, TCFD frameworks triggered; increased disclosure scrutiny.
Potential for higher cost of capital (+20-40bps) if perceived as ESG laggard; possible FII outflow.
